title: Inheritable Coat Color
description: Introduces a realistic genetic inheritance system for sheep coat colors and wool characteristics
body:
# Abstract

**Inheritable Coat Color** is a Minecraft mod that introduces a realistic genetic inheritance system for sheep coat colors and wool characteristics. Built as an example implementation of the [Chromosome Lib](https://github.com/Viola-Siemens/Chromosome-Lib) framework, this mod replaces Minecraft's simple color inheritance mechanics with a sophisticated genetics-based system inspired by real-world Mendelian inheritance.

# Key Features

*   **Genetic Inheritance System**: Sheep offspring inherit coat colors through a multi-gene system featuring dominant, recessive, incomplete dominant, and sex-linked alleles.
*   **Complex Color Genetics**: Coat colors are determined by multiple interacting genes including:  
    *   Melanin enzyme production (black pigment).
    *   Uranidin enzyme production (yellow pigment, X-linked).
    *   Melanin metabolic enzyme (affects pigment attachment).
    *   Dilution genes (incomplete dominance affecting color intensity).
    *   Pink mutation gene.
    *   Special pigment genes (magenta and green, with co-dominance).
*   **Hair Length Trait**: Introduces long-haired and short-haired variants through a single gene with Mendelian inheritance. Long-haired sheep produce more wool when sheared.
*   **Chromosomal Mechanics**: Genes are mapped to specific chromosomes with realistic mutation rates and crossing-over probabilities.
*   **Sex Determination**: Implements XY sex determination system with sex-linked traits.
